description: This segment illustrates the story of Odysseus and his men escaping the land of the Cyclopes, showing a painting of the crew rowing frantically away from a giant on the cliffs who is preparing to hurl a boulder at their ship. (objects: ship, boulder, rocks; location: shoreline near the land of the Cyclopes) | The video displays a classical painting of an elaborate palace garden filled with people
when_to_use: (draft) beats functioning as evidence — review the source span and author the roles
